name: dply
description: No auth. No config. Just deploy.

scripts.build: bun run build:cli && bun run build:site && bun run build:release
scripts.build:release: mkdir -p dist/release && bun build src/main.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile dist/release/dply-darwin-arm64 && bun build src/main.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 --outfile dist/release/dply-darwin-x64 && bun build src/main.ts --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile dist/release/dply-linux-x64 && bun build src/main.ts --compile --target=bun-linux-arm64 --outfile dist/release/dply-linux-arm64
scripts.deploy:site: bun run build && npx --yes wrangler@latest deploy
scripts.smoke:dry: bun run src/main.ts --dry-run fixtures/single-html/index.html && bun run src/main.ts --dry-run fixtures/static-site && bun run src/main.ts --dry-run fixtures/vite-app
